kernel_metric_A.note: RBF from sq Mahalanobis delta^T E[W^T W] delta (not from E[W] projection alone).

notes.EW_raw: If frob≈0, kappa/eff_rank are nan — not evidence that metric E[W^T W] is zero.
notes.kernel_blocks: kernel_metric_A uses delta^T E[W^T W] delta. kernel_projected_Z_from_EW_only uses Z=X E[W]^T (can degenerate when E[W]≈0).
